display_name: UK Law (LLB) — Pakistani student, September 2026 intake

currency.rate_note: Update before demo; hardcoded fallback if FX API unavailable

red_flag_rules.description: Quoted deposit exceeds the university's published deposit figure
red_flag_rules.agent_line: The published deposit for {university} is £{published}. Can you explain why you're quoting £{quoted}?

red_flag_rules.description: Total consultancy charges below market floor — likely hidden fees later
red_flag_rules.agent_line: That's well below what other consultancies charge. Are there any fees that come up later in the process?

red_flag_rules.description: Claims of guaranteed visa or guaranteed admission
red_flag_rules.agent_line: I understood visa decisions are made only by UKVI. Is that guarantee in writing?

red_flag_rules.description: Artificial urgency: pay-today discounts, 'last seat' claims
red_flag_rules.agent_line: I won't be deciding today. Does that offer stand if I come back next week?

levers.line: Another consultancy quoted £{amount} for the same service. Can you match or beat that?
Some consultancies charge no service fee because universities pay them commission. Why should I pay yours?
If I use you for the visa file as well, can you waive the application service fee?
Before any total, I need each fee itemised separately — service, application, deposit, visa.

honesty_constraints: Never invent grades, IELTS scores, or financial figures — use only the confirmed StudentProfile.
Never fabricate a competitor offer — leverage lines may cite ONLY amounts returned by the get_leverage tool.
Never accept or promise payment on the call.

ai_disclosure.line: Yes — I'm an AI assistant calling on behalf of a real student who reviews everything I gather. Are you comfortable continuing?

personas.name: Adeel — SkyBridge Consultants
personas.style: Friendly, evasive on fees, pushes commission-paying universities (Hull, UWE) over the student's stated preferences, dodges itemisation twice before yielding.
personas.resistance: Deflects fee questions with 'package deals'; only itemises when pressed a third time.
personas.concession_rule: Drops service fee from £350 to £200 only when confronted with a cheaper competitor quote.

personas.name: Maryam — Crescent Education
personas.style: Professional and precise, but quotes a low headline fee and reveals attestation/courier/file charges only when asked directly per-item.
personas.resistance: Answers only exactly what is asked; never volunteers extra fees.
personas.concession_rule: Waives the £100 'file opening' charge if the caller flags the below-market-floor red flag.

personas.name: Rana sahib — Al-Falah Visa Services
personas.style: Brusque, insists on an office visit, refuses prices on the phone, questions whether caller is genuine, asks if it's a robot.
personas.resistance: Gives no numbers for the first half of the call; tests AI disclosure.
personas.concession_rule: If caller handles the AI question honestly and cites a specific competitor quote, grudgingly gives an itemised quote or commits to a callback with a named time.

call_list.search_query: study abroad consultants UK visa Lahore
call_list.note: Phase 1 script fills data/call_list.json from Google Places or OSM
